title: jasione humilis subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Jasione humilis subsp. cavanillesii is a plant species belonging to the Jasione genus, commonly known as the small blue thistle or small blue alpine thistle, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Jasione humilis subsp. cavanillesii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in phytotherapy to create creams and ointments for topical application.
